## Summary

- Describe the problem and solution briefly.

## Related Issues

- Fixes #

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Build/CI

## Testing

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `go test -race ./...`
- [ ] Added or updated tests for changed behavior

If you changed frontend assets/templates/dependencies:

- [ ] `go generate ./assets/...`

If you changed performance-sensitive paths (`internal/index`, `internal/repo`, `internal/manager`, `internal/tasks`):

- [ ] Included benchmark notes or results

## Checklist

- [ ] I updated relevant documentation.
- [ ] I kept the change focused and avoided unrelated refactors.
- [ ] I considered context cancellation and resource cleanup where applicable.
